title: Performance & Financial Reports
description: Performance and financial reports provide information for the President, Congress and the public to assess mission performance and stewardship of resources.
text:
Agency Financial Report for Fiscal Year 2025, full report; also available by section:
Secretary's Message, Table of Contents, Management's Discussion and Analysis
Financial Information, Includes Chief Financial Officer Message, Financial Statements and Notes, and Independent Auditors’ Report
Other Information, Includes Payment Integrity Information, Major Management Challenges and Management’s Response, and Appendices (including list of Acronyms)
